author: Savoyyy
title: 10 Playlist limit, annoying Ads
content: You get sketchy ads every time you use the app and would give partially blind/elder people malware which is why I rate 2 stars, (used offline is the only workaround) and they force you to pay for premium if you want more than 10 playlists (10 playlists for different genres is still generous I guess, just doesn’t fit my needs). You also get a free equalizer whereas other apps charge premium. You also can edit pictures on individual songs, titles, and playlist thumbnails.

author: Vericky
title: Getting Greedy!
content: This is a great app but I’m glad I purchased it a couple of months ago before they doubled the price and tripled the monthly rental rate. Bite the bullet if you need a great player but do your homework and research other options. Google Gemini helped me find this app and it’ll help you find other choices.

author: Amy.LCY
title: Doesn’t work for CarPlay
content: After the recent update, CarPlay has become extremely unstable. Songs often stop playing halfway when connected to CarPlay, but everything works perfectly fine when using the app directly through the speaker or phone without CarPlay. This issue never existed before, so it definitely feels like a bug introduced in the update. Very frustrating and disappointing.

author: Podlover33
title: Best app
content: Best app ever fr

author: L'idéaliste
title: Un must
content: Superbe et seule application pour lire avec facilité tous mes fichiers MP3, MP4, de langues modernes en succession depuis iCloud, entre autres

author: kareful_seam
title: I like it!
content: I’ve tried several music apps to try and play music from my files and shuffle nicely, preferably without ads. I tried Fileplay and the first thing it did was pop up and ad and wouldn’t play my mp3s from files. SHAREit has serious problems with its shuffle and lots of ads when connect to the internet, or when my phone data is on…..but EVERMUSIC hasn’t caused any problems so far. No ads which is honestly awesome and it’s played great, shuffle works well.

author: Sifa N.B
title: Perfect but…
content: Needs a dark mode :,)) my eyes hurt at night

author: Me3_z
title: Does EverMusic support and will possibly support ramping the speed and pitch?
content: Would be awesome and very Pro :)

content: Workfs for a couple of hours before only playing a select few and not the entire playlist

author: RupertBruce

content: I can never find my local ‘Music’ file on my iPhone and am tired of trying!!

content: I LOVE IT I LOVE IT I LOVE IT

author: Olivier fano

content: Difficile à utiliser

author: Mohammad El-Sinawi
title: Very Annoying ads
content: This app has so many annoying ads that keep popping up on the screen, and it doesn’t have a browser or download manager, and it doesn’t have a zip file download option and zip and unzip files, and it doesn’t have any option for editing music or trim or split or Merge files together, or cut, or extract audio from video, and it has so many annoying disturbing ads that keep popping up on the screen, and they only give you the option to upgrade the app with a subscription or a very expensive purchase.

author: kia !!
title: skipping songs
content: everytime i try and PLAY a song, it skips to the other one. I CANNOT even play HALF of my playlist. very disappointed.

author: Naviofficer
title: Не видит треки
content: Как же уже надоело что после каждых обновлений программа не видит то одни, то другие треки. Неужели нельзя заранее тестировать приложение, прежде чем выкладывать его?!

author: Knightg6
title: Great value!
content: Perfect app!

author: Rouky777
title: Jouer en boucle
content: Il manque le bouton ( jouer en boucle ).

author: AntoQC
title: En général, Evermusic est une bonne application. C’est très utile et je m’en sert souvent!
content:
Evermusic est une bonne application qui fait amplement le travail pour écouter de la musique et faire des playlist avec des fichiers. En général, l’application fonctionne bien. Par contre, j’ai rencontré quelques bugs comme par exemple :
1 - Quand j’ajoute une musique à une playlist, elle ne s’ajoute pas.
2 - Quand je modifie les balises audio et que j’ajoute une photo de couverture à mon fichier, la photo ne s’ajoute pas.
3 - Quand j’appuie sur la musique pour la faire jouer, la musique ne veut pas jouer.
C’est à cause de ces bugs que je ne met pas 5 étoiles, mais sinon le reste est très bien et j’apprécie beaucoup cette application!

author: Capitaine_IC
title: Good alternative
content:
Very good app and work as intended, pretty cheap when you consider the price of a real subscription.
Love it.

author: zuri_iuiu
title: Buggy
content: Has gotten extremely buggy ever since the new update. Won’t let me delete songs from album, add songs, or even rearrange them

author: FrequencyModulator
title: Amazing app
content:
I was looking for an offline music player to:
1. Easily upload the music to
2. Easy to use
3. No ads (for a price of course).
This app does all that and then some more.
Special thanks to developer(s) for having the Premium Lifetime option. For me this was a decisive factor.

author: Sir Onion the Third
title: The Best Music Player for iOS (in my opinion)
content:
This is by far the best music player for iOS. It meets every single criteria for me. The UI is great, the EQ settings are also great. It works absolutely beautifully for my needs.

I use this app mainly to listen to my own music, and it’s great because I can just transfer them to Evermusic through my files app.

author: DonSpiridon
title: Nice
content: It has all I need. It would be nice if it could play WMA format as well. Also, if you have large collection of mp3 files and folders, it takes a while to open it. Pretty sure the performance can be improved.

author: Ninoneenoo
title: Great but still buggy
content: Great app and configuration/layout and I love that you can edit tags and album art, BUT full and I mean full of bugs, such as the app closing/failing on you randomly, not playing selected songs, and messing up the music library within the app…

author: Azure Impact
title: Very well designed
content:
I wish to thank the developers of this app. I enjoy the dark mode, and having the ability to customize music albums and file names. Likewise, your premium feature is within a reasonable price, unlike most applications in this day and age.

As a request, please add a feature in the tab which shows all songs from every file, and allow a word based search within it.

author: Apple User Since 2009
title: this app is more than a lifesaver and premium is totally worth it
content: Literally love the work put into this app + its functions in general. Only bug I’ve encountered the last few months is most of my songs skipping ahead randomly by about 30-1 minute, which yes- irritating, but I’m just thankful to have this app in general. Would love if that was fixed in future updates tho- skipping the main chorus to any Fleetwood Mac song is a crime😭

author: ageste
title: Bug issues
content: Honestly it’s a really good app and I enjoy using it, but after a few days, I came back to listen to the songs and playlists I had downloaded and now they’re all one-second long! But I do have to update it now, so I think it’ll go back to normal. Just finished updating, it’s back to normal. I love this app and how it can play songs offline, and play them while having your phone “off” or doing things that don’t involve listening to other things, (because then it’ll stop playing).

author: little rosette
title: Excellent!!!
content: Must have

author: CptKatsuura
title: Used to be fast to load songs
content: Now it takes forever to load my local itunes music.

author: Trend.
title: Gotten worse over time.
content: Started good… After the most recent update… things started to get 20X worse… Bug that I can’t explain how to do it or get footage of it because it only started after I did the update… (Can’t edit audio tags) And the files duplicate so when I shut down my phone… the duplicate files are deleted and some just fully disappear… Now restarting doesn’t delete the files and makes it unplayable. Now after Another uninstall and reinstall, I can’t even open download files.

author: Agluegun
content: best app I’ve been using until now

author: Lightea!
title: Best music player everr
content: Pros - very good user interface - includes song banner, even when its a song thats downloaded - included equaliser - very cusmonizable - cloud acsess Cons - no widgets - needs money for some features I didnt need to pay any money but the app is still awesome

author: Banx$$
title: Glitchy
content: I have been using this app for a long time. But the latest updates made the app glitched when I play a song it jumps back. It sounds like a scratched CD back in the days.

author: GCxxxYz
title: Nice
content: Nice

author: vhn81
title: Good
content: I can not change thé order of songs in an album

title: Went from usable to unusable after latest update
content: Loads a song then freezes, good job with the update. Wasn’t broken before

author: Красно Девитса
title: Free Evermusic > Most other music streaming services
content:
Yes, there are some ads, but they’re either not intrusive at all (on top of playlist cover and you can just click on the X and there will be a screen pop-up stating that it’s possible to purchase premium) or a single short video ad every once in a while. And it is automatically muted. Compared to the free version of Spotify in terms of music streaming quality, this is like comparing the size of a person to the biggest star in our universe. 

There are sometimes slight bugs, but generally it’s really not bad. I really love the feature that looks for data about the song on the internet given limited data (eg only the song name). 

Devs, thank you for such an amazing app that is amazing without forced payment. And even the premium version is a lifetime price of what would be a single month subscription for Spotify.

author: Zitialien
title: Godsend
content: Minimal annoying ads and straightforward menu.

author: Dimanba
title: Loved it but now MAJOR BUGS
content: It loads, doesn’t want to play the music! It loads so so so so much! Never did that before! I payed for the premium version and this is what I get… please fix it!

author: Oldasf
title: Update
content: Since the update the music stops playing every time a lot of bug. Too bad I really liked the app before

author: tagacebu
title: Went downhill?
content:
After the latest update, it is useless. Opens up but will stop playing later or just quits unexpectedly. When you open the app, it will then exit. Can’t use it at all. 

Also, I have around 5k plus music. And backing that would give me almost a 1 GB of backup file! I can’t imagine what’s inside. But if it’s just meta and images (small ones at that), I would assume it would not be that much. I’m just staggered!

Anyway, as a paying customer, I’m really disappointed. It has very good potential that I was close to ditching Apple Music and Spotify - which I’m planning of doing in the future. For now, I’m using Documents which works flawlessly. 

I wish I can get my money back.

author: Zero.nine20
title: Awesome
content: Great music player

author: Andy889789
title: Good app
content: pretty good, I like the equalizer!

author: Monavis2011
title: Best music player
content: Nothing more to say

author: Sanarov
title: better than standard music player
content:
lets you upload mp3s from a variety of methods. plays with the screen off. works with bluetooth... obviously. equalizer is nice. 

really not much to complain about because if you're looking for something better than apple's music player, this does everything but
better.

author: acupunctureee
title: Nice app
content: Good quality and easy to use

author: mp3005
title: Best Music Player By Far
content: I have tried pretty much every music player on the AppStore to organize my downloaded mp3 files, and this one is by far the best one. No bugs when it comes to metadata and importing files, lets you listen with the screen off, and has a great UI. Doesn’t charge you a ridiculous monthly fee for premium, just a reasonable one time payment. Developers: don’t change this app, it is great as it is! Will probably buy premium en eventually.

author: hbukdhsbcjdkhewvliu
title: Pretty good
content: Only took me like 5 minutes to figure the app out and then I got all my music on there and it works great. There is ads but not when you are playing your music. Only a few banner ads in the app.

author: seawavesm
title: Still has major bugs
content: It’s the perfect music player for me, but there are major bugs. I can’t seem to download songs and it will stop inmiddle of the downloading process. The album art turned out to be a bit broken. It’s taking a long time to download songs, and have to load a long time too before playing a song. I hope developers can fix these bugs, overall it’s a perfect music player.

author: HaroldGsingh
title: Good app/starting to bother me
content: It’s a good app but I’m starting to have trouble with it now. Whenever I download a song it won’t let me skim through it. Whenever I try skipping through it it starts from the beginning again & it’s really making me mad. Please fix it.

author: Moniila
title: Please help. Not all good
content: It does exactly what I want it to do, but there's a glitch... I can stream my music to ChromeCast but the second my screen turns off, it completely stops! I do NOT want to keep my screen on while listening to music on my Tv ChromeCast. I really like this app: I bought some music online and downloaded it to Dropbox and can listen to anything I want :) The only issue is with ChromeCast... bummer...

title: Download problem
content: Ive been trying download a new song but when i play it, it disapears and plays an alreadg downloaded song. Then i try to download it again it says the file alreadg exists, it was working just fine till now.. whats going on??
